name: Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions Inc.
summary: Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions Inc. (AITX), through its subsidiary Robotic Assistance Devices Inc. (RAD), delivers AI-powered security and facility management solutions combining intelligent hardware robots (ROAMEO, ROSA, AVA, TOM, RADDOG, HERO, RIO, RADCam, RAM) with software platforms including SARA Agentic AI and ROSS firearm detection. Solutions are offered primarily as recurring monthly subscriptions with minimum 12-month contracts, targeting commercial and public sector clients in the global security and facility management markets.

products.name: SARA (Speaking Autonomous Responsive Agent)
products.description: Agentic AI platform powered by large language models enabling RAD devices to speak, listen, interpret, and take autonomous action in real time.

products.name: ROAMEO
products.description: Mobile autonomous security robot designed for patrolling corporate campuses and similar environments.

products.name: RADDOG
products.description: Mobile security robot solution offered as part of RAD's mobile solutions portfolio.

products.name: HERO
products.description: Mobile security device included in RAD's mobile solutions lineup.

products.name: AVA
products.description: Access and entry control device enabling efficient gate access control and real-time delivery processing.

products.name: TOM
products.description: Access and entry solution designed for visitor greeting and front desk engagement.

products.name: ROSA
products.description: Stationary autonomous security device deployed to deter incidents such as vehicle damage and graffiti.

products.name: RIO
products.description: Stationary security device included in RAD's stationary solutions portfolio.

products.name: RADCam
products.description: Stationary camera-based security device offered by RAD.

products.name: RAM
products.description: Stationary security solution included in RAD's stationary product lineup.

products.name: ROSS
products.description: Firearm detection software solution offered as part of AITX's software and intelligence portfolio.

products.name: RAD Light My Way
products.description: Security solution deployed at hospital networks to improve staff safety.

partnerships.description: Global logistics leader deploying RAD robotic solutions to deliver cost-effective security within logistics operations.
RAD channel partner customizing 24-hour solutions using RAD technology to reduce reliance on manpower.
RAD authorized dealer deploying ROSA units with projected client savings of ~$300,000 over three years.
